message:
fix(api): validate dropout probability range and embedding index integrity

- Add [0,1] range check to functional_dropout, returning an error when
  p < 0 or p > 1 instead of producing nonsensical scaling factors or
  negative probabilities
- Add non-negative check and integer-valued check to functional_embedding
  indices, rejecting negative and fractional index values before the
  bounds check — previously negative indices would wrap via as-usize cast
  and fractional indices would silently truncate
- Add functional_dropout_rejects_probability_below/above_zero tests
- Add functional_embedding_rejects_negative/fractional_index tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
